doc_html:
PART V. RURAL HOSPITAL PRESERVATION ACT

§1189.1. Short title

            This Part may be cited as the "Rural Hospital Preservation Act".

            Acts 1997, No. 1485, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1300.141 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
